name: MediaEnumVideoCapturers
title: MediaEnumVideoCapturers
description: Enumerates a list of video capture devices.

parameters.name: retCount
parameters.description: Count of elements provided in videoCapturerHandles.Caller: Set to elCount(videoCapturerHandles). On successful return of the function this parameter contains the number of valid handles in the videoCapturerHandles array.

parameters.name: retVideoCapturerHandles
parameters.description: Array in which this function returns the video capturer handles of all video capture devices that are available. After its use the caller must release each audio capturer returned in the array by calling MediaReleaseVideoCapturer.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
